ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "honest_proportion" REAL /* Proportion of honest transactions in the market */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round or iteration number of the metric */,
  "total_honest_effective_balance" INTEGER /* Total effective balance of honest users */,
  "alpha" REAL /* Alpha parameter used in the metric calculation */,
  "sum_balance_honest" REAL /* Sum of balances of honest users */,
  "sum_balance_all" REAL /* Sum of all balances in the market */,
  "take" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether a take profit action was executed */,
  "metric_timestamp" TEXT /* The exact timestamp when the metric was recorded */,
  "market_volume" REAL /* The total volume of transactions in the market */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* The total market capitalization */,
  "price_change_24h" REAL /* The percentage change in price over the last 24 hours */,
  "number_of_honest_transactions" INTEGER /* The number of honest transactions in the current metric */,
  "number_of_all_transactions" INTEGER /* The total number of transactions in the current metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "is_honest" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user is considered honest */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* User's date of birth */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "total_transactions" INTEGER /* The total number of transactions made by the user */,
  "total_honest_transactions" INTEGER /* The total number of honest transactions made by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "is_honest" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the transaction is considered honest */,
  "transaction_timestamp" TEXT /* The exact timestamp of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell, transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., completed, pending, failed) */,
  "transaction_fee" REAL /* The fee charged for the transaction */,
  "cryptocurrency" TEXT /* The type of cryptocurrency involved in the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each balance entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "effective_balance" REAL /* Effective balance considering honest behavior */,
  "total_balance" REAL /* Total balance of the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the balance was last updated */,
  "cryptocurrency" TEXT /* The type of cryptocurrency for the balance */,
  "last_transaction_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the last transaction affecting the balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_balances_last_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rewards" (
  "reward_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reward */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the reward */,
  "reward_amount" REAL /* Amount of the reward */,
  "reward_date" TEXT /* Date when the reward was given */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the reward */,
  "reward_type" TEXT /* Type of reward (e.g., discount, bonus) */,
  "reward_status" TEXT /* Status of the reward (e.g., issued, redeemed) */,
  "reward_expiration_date" TEXT /* The date when the reward expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reward_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rewards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fees" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user charged with the fee */,
  "fee_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fee */,
  "fee_date" TEXT /* Date when the fee was charged */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the fee */,
  "fee_type" TEXT /* Type of fee (e.g., trading, withdrawal) */,
  "fee_status" TEXT /* Status of the fee (e.g., charged, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, reviewed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES market_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "api_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each API access */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key used for access */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the API was accessed */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request made */,
  "api_method" TEXT /* The HTTP method used (e.g., GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* The endpoint accessed */,
  "api_status_code" INTEGER /* The HTTP status code of the response */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security log */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of security event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the event was triggered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the user involved in the event (if applicable) */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
